{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Aethertech scanners
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Karoshans use handheld [[Aethertech scanners]] to inspect armor.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21">''The Engineer'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
